_doc: Load order for the mapping-driven C2M2 -> RO-Crate converter (c2m2_convert.py). 'root' fills the crate root/identity; 'entities' are the per-table row-explosion mappings, applied in each file's 'order'. The 14 CFDE C2M2 controlled-vocabulary (CV term) tables are a class of their own -> each becomes a schema.org DefinedTerm and lives under mappings/cv/. Extending coverage = add a file to 'entities'.
